rationale_top3: Entertainment facilities (13/20): Strong entertainment offerings with dedicated facilities for family activities Location & Cleanliness (9/10 each): Excellent Warrnambool location with well-maintained, clean facilities throughout the park Nature setting (8/10): Pleasant natural surroundings providing a good backdrop for a holiday park experience
rationale_honourable: Value for money (6/10): Reasonable pricing considering the facilities and location offered
water_fun: Coastal location provides access to Warrnambool's beaches and waterfront attractions
kids_play: Good entertainment facilities with family-focused activities available on-site
pet_detail: Moderate pet provisions (5/10) - pets may be accepted with some restrictions or limitations
best_for: Families, couples exploring the Great Ocean Road region, coastal holiday seekers
